bird.name: Botteri's sparrow
bird.summary: Botteri's sparrow (Peucaea botterii) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae, the New World sparrows. It is found from the southwe…

locations.name: 瓜納卡斯特山脈
locations.summary: 瓜納卡斯特山脈是哥斯達黎加的山脈，位於該國北部，毗鄰與尼加拉瓜接壤的邊境，全長110公里，最高點海拔高度2,028米，該山體在第四紀形成。

relations.subject: Botteri's sparrow
relations.evidence: | pages =608 }} The southerly petenica group inhabits the same landscape types as the botterii group and also pine forest and lowland pine savanna. In northern Central America this group ranges from sea level to and in Costa Rica occurs between . Botteri's sparrow was not found in Arizona between the 1890s and the mid-20th century due to excessive grazing of livestock; now it is locally common in its Arizona range due to recovery of vegetation
